_description: Minimal SCORM 1.2 package with two fixable label/input pairs (page1 and page2) and one ambiguous case (page3 — two labels and two inputs in one block). associate-form-label should fix the two unambiguous pairs and decline the ambiguous one.
notes: The associate-form-label fixer pairs <label> with <input> when exactly one of each is present in a parent block with no existing for/id. Page 3 has two labels and two inputs in one block — the fixer declines (ambiguous). Exact resolved count depends on what 1.3.1/3.3.2 static checks emit per page.
